ResumeSummariser

AI-powered resume summariser that extracts key skills and experience using LLMs, deployed on Kubernetes with GitOps.

DevOpsProject

Full DevOps stack with Helm charts and Redis deployed on Amazon EKS, provisioned with Terraform.
